response.justification: Experienced full-stack engineer with 15+ years across the stack, strong TypeScript/Node.js background, React and MongoDB experience at Optilyz, AWS/Docker/Kubernetes exposure, and current AI-agent/MCP work at re:cinq. Testing craftsmanship is a clear strength (TDD advocate, authored test tooling like Trial and Fluent-Asserts). Gaps in Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are likely bridgeable given demonstrated polyglot adaptability.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js + React full-stack experience with cloud (AWS CDK) and MongoDB
Current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators
Strong testing/quality culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, authored test frameworks
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience mentioned in the resume
Kotlin not listed; Java present but appears limited and dated
Heavy DLang focus in several roles may indicate less time spent on the core JS/TS stack than tenure suggests

key_factors.factor: AI-agent / MCP experience matches required skill
